channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. The following table is a list of all the releases that are housed under the DrupalWxT organization on GitHub. Release Created Date Description 3.0.24 2021-05-27T12:47:17Z Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.9.16 SA-core-2021-003 Upgrade path: Update your codebase:
